entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: Most important food grain legume of South Asia, known as gram, Bengal gram, or garbanzo bean

entities.name: SOUTH ASIA
entities.description: Region where chickpea is the most important food grain legume

entities.name: COMMON BEAN
entities.description: One of the most important food grain legumes globally

entities.name: FIELD PEA
entities.description: One of the most important food grain legumes globally

entities.name: DIPLOID
entities.description: Genome structure characterized by two complete sets of chromosomes

entities.name: CHROMOSOMES
entities.description: Thread-like structures of nucleic acids and protein carrying genetic information

entities.name: GENOME SIZE
entities.description: The total amount of DNA in a haploid genome, approximately 750 Mbp for chickpea

entities.name: MIDDLE EAST
entities.description: Region where early chickpea cultivation was uncovered in archaeological sites

entities.name: DESI
entities.description: Market type class of chickpea characterized by small, angular, dark seeds and pink flowers

entities.name: KABULI
entities.description: Market type class of chickpea characterized by large, smooth, rams head-shaped seeds

entities.name: SEED SIZE
entities.description: Physical dimension of the seed, varying between small in desi and large in kabuli

entities.name: SEED SHAPE
entities.description: Physical form of the seed, varying between angular in desi and rams head-shaped in kabuli

entities.name: SEED COLOR
entities.description: Color of the seed, dark-colored in desi types

entities.name: SEED SURFACE
entities.description: Texture of the seed surface, rough in desi and smooth in kabuli

entities.name: FLOWER COLOR
entities.description: Color of the flowers, pink in desi types

entities.name: ANTHOCYANIN PIGMENTATION
entities.description: Pigmentation on stems, present in desi and absent in kabuli

entities.name: GROWTH HABIT
entities.description: The general shape or tendency of growth, semi-erect or semi-spreading

entities.name: PLANT GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: All forms of cultivated species and their related wild species used for conservation and improvement

entities.name: GENETIC IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The process of improving the genetic makeup of a crop using genetic resources

entities.name: WILD SPECIES
entities.description: Non-cultivated species related to the cultivated chickpea used for genetic improvement
